description: WCAG AA compliance baseline for every Sovereign-generated app.
rules: Every text element must meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio against its background
UI components (buttons, inputs, focus indicators) must meet 3:1 contrast ratio
All interactive elements must be keyboard-navigable (Tab, Enter, Space, Escape, Arrow keys)
Every image must have descriptive alt text, or alt='' for decorative images
Form inputs must have associated <label> elements or aria-label attributes
Focus must be visible at all times — never use outline: none without a replacement
Page must have a logical heading hierarchy (one <h1>, nested <h2>, <h3>)
All interactive elements must have accessible names readable by screen readers
No content flashes more than 3 times per second (seizure prevention)
Color must never be the only means of conveying information

button_background.requirement: 4.5:1 for button text on button background
button_background.formula: brightness = (R*299 + G*587 + B*114) / 1000. > 128 = use #1a1a1a text. <= 128 = use #ffffff text.

testing_methods: axe DevTools browser extension — automated scan catches ~30% of issues
Manual keyboard navigation test — Tab through every interactive element
Screen reader test — VoiceOver (Mac), NVDA (Windows), TalkBack (Android)
Color contrast checker — WebAIM Contrast Checker or browser DevTools
Zoom test — page must remain usable at 200% browser zoom
Reduced motion test — respect prefers-reduced-motion media query

checklist.test: Inspect with browser DevTools color picker, verify ratio
Run axe or wave scan — missing alt is flagged automatically
Tab to each input — screen reader should announce the label

checklist.item: Focus ring visible on all interactive elements
checklist.test: Tab through page — every focused element must have visible outline
Install Accessibility Insights — heading order view

checklist.item: Keyboard navigation works for all core flows
checklist.test: Complete signup, login, and core action with keyboard only

checklist.item: ARIA roles used correctly where semantic HTML is insufficient
checklist.test: Validate with axe — incorrect ARIA is flagged
Enable reduced motion in OS — animations should stop or fade

common_failures: Placeholder text used as label (disappears on focus, low contrast)
Custom dropdown or modal not focusable with keyboard
Link that looks like a button with no href (must use <button> or add href + role)
Error message shown only in red color with no text or icon
Modal that doesn't trap focus (Tab navigates to content behind the modal)
references: Don Norman — 'The Design of Everyday Things' — affordances, feedback, discoverability
